query:
INSERT INTO promo_codes (code, description, benefitType, discountPercent, maxUses, currentUses, isActive, createdAt)
VALUES 
  ('openpecker50', 'Get instant premium access for free', 'lifetime_premium', 100, 100, 0, 1, NOW()),
  ('openpecker80', 'Get 80% off premium access - limited to first 400 users', 'discount', 80, 400, 0, 1, NOW());
